positive: A mystical, highly detailed forest scene silhouette, showing glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized fox spirits leaping through fern undergrowth. The primary subject is a trio of graceful, stylized foxes in motion, forming a dynamic central composition. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, using deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted sharply with luminous teal and gold highlights. The composition must be highly symmetrical and designed to look perfect as a repeating pattern or large apparel graphic. Use clean lines, strong outlines, and excellent depth perspective. High contrast, volumetric lighting, suitable for screen printing.
